do_not_merge.reason: Same street and borough but different limits (Morningside Avenue vs Amsterdam Avenue) — per corridor rule: same street with differing limits never merges. Limits are a strong identity field.

stationary-manhattan is a list of multiple corridors; it has no single street+limits identity. A compound record aggregating many segments is not the same canonical identity as a specific corridor segment. No strong identity fields match.
Same reasoning as above: stationary-manhattan is a collection, not a specific corridor with defined limits. Distinct identities.

suggestion.rationale: Corridor identity requires street+borough+limits. The two 125th St records have different western limits (Morningside vs Amsterdam), so they are distinct corridors. The stationary-manhattan record aggregates many corridors with no single limit, making it a different entity type. All pairs are do_not_merge.
